summary: Frontend E2E testing completed for Ketsia portfolio site. All 16 features in the review request work as expected. Home page (hero/about/skills/portfolio/contact), nav smooth-scrolling, portfolio card switching with N8N workflow (5 nodes), contact form submission with success toast and form clearing, admin dashboard (stats, filters, Mark Read, Archive, Delete with confirm, Refresh, Back to Portfolio) all functional. Backend integration confirmed working - data persists, stats update live (3/3/0/0 -> 3/2/1/0 after Mark Read).

issues: Message textarea uses focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-amber-500 (line 571) while Name/Email inputs use blue focus ring. Inconsistent with the peaceful blue theme - should be blue-500 to match.
Social icons (LinkedIn, GitHub, Mail) have placeholder href='#' - non-functional links. Consider adding real URLs or removing.
When variant='default', the All/New/Read/Archived filter buttons render as dark/black instead of using the blue gradient theme - works fine but visually disconnected from peaceful blue palette.

action_items: Fix Message textarea focus color in Home.jsx line 571: change focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-amber-500 to focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-blue-500 for theme consistency.
Add data-testid attributes to key interactive elements (nav links, form fields, submit/refresh/delete buttons, filter buttons, automation cards) to improve test stability.
Replace footer social link placeholders (href='#') with real URLs or remove if not applicable.
Optional: style admin filter active state with brand blue gradient instead of default dark.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is 619 lines - consider splitting (Hero, About, Skills, Portfolio, Contact, Footer) into separate components for maintainability.
automations array is defined inline in Home.jsx - consider extracting to /data/automations.js for separation of data and presentation.
mock.js: file name 'mock.js' is misleading since it now makes real API calls. Rename to 'api.js' for clarity.
updateSubmissionStatus uses status as query parameter (?status=read) on a PATCH endpoint - works but a JSON body is more RESTful.
No data-testid attributes anywhere - hampers automated testing reliability.
AdminDashboard has no auth - publicly accessible at /admin route. Anyone can view, modify, delete submissions. Should add auth gating before production.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 contact submission via form (TEST_User / test@example.com) which was then Mark Read + Archived + Deleted during test cycle. 2 prior submissions remained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 features from the review request pass end-to-end. Only theme/polish design issues remain (amber focus on Message textarea, dark filter buttons, placeholder social links). Backend /api/contact CRUD endpoints verified working (POST list 200, PATCH status, DELETE). Admin /admin route is unauthenticated.
